Type Property# keyboardWillShow

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+

```
static var keyboardWillShow: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIResponder.KeyboardWillShowMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIResponder.KeyboardWillShowMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/keyboardwillshow#see-also)
